characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long straight brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: Striped long-sleeve polo shirt (white and dark blue), grey sweatpants.
characters.demeanor: Initially frustrated, then engaged and thoughtful while learning.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलना इतना मुश्किल क्यों है? [Why is speaking English so difficult?]
Unknown speaker says: Let's practice. What do you do? [Let's practice. What do you do?]
Character A says: I am do... job. [I am do... job.]
Unknown speaker says: How about, 'I am working'? [How about, 'I am working'?]
Character A says: I am working. [I am working.]
Unknown speaker says: Do you like your job? [Do you like your job?]
Character A says: Yes, I... [Yes, I...]
Unknown speaker says: Do you mean 'Yes, I like it'? [Do you mean 'Yes, I like it'?]
Character A says: Yes, I like it. [Yes, I like it.]
Unknown speaker says: Where do you work? [Where do you work?]
Character A says: I... bank...? [I... bank...?]
Unknown speaker says: Do you mean 'I work at a bank'? [Do you mean 'I work at a bank'?]
Character A says: I work at a bank. [I work at a bank.]
Character A says: मैं रोज़ ऐसे ही English practice कैसे करूँ? [How do I practice English like this every day?]
Unknown speaker says: Just download Supernova. [Just download Supernova.]
Character A says: मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [I'll download Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the relatable frustration of struggling with spoken English while doing everyday chores.
- Demonstrates the core product value: a non-judgmental AI tutor that gently corrects mistakes in real-time.
- Ends with a clear, actionable call-to-action to download the app for daily practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलना इतना मुश्किल क्यों है? (Why is speaking English so difficult?)
Let's practice. What do you do?
I am do... job.
How about, 'I am working'?
I am working.
Do you like your job?
Yes, I...
Do you mean 'Yes, I like it'?
Yes, I like it.
Where do you work?
I... bank...?
Do you mean 'I work at a bank'?
I work at a bank.
मैं रोज़ ऐसे ही English practice कैसे करूँ? (How do I practice English like this every day?)
Just download Supernova.
मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। (I'll download Supernova right now.)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Standard end card driving app downloads.
- Displays app store availability clearly.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
